error.account_not_verified: Please verify your email before logging in
error.account_inactive: Account deactivated. Contact support to reactivate
error.password_same: New password must be different from current

ok.account_created: User registered. Please verify your email
ok.email_verified: Email verified successfully. You can now log in
ok.email_change_requested: Verification email sent to your new address
ok.password_reset_sent: If the email exists, you will receive a password reset link

error.not_authorized: You don't have permission to view this order
error.already_refunded: This order has already been refunded
error.refund_pending: A refund request is already pending
error.cannot_refund: Only paid or delivered orders can be refunded

verify_email.subject: Verify your {appName} account
verify_email.body: Please verify your account by clicking the following link:
verify_email.fallback: Or copy and paste this link:

reset_password.subject: Password recovery - {appName}
reset_password.body: You have requested to reset your password. Click the following link:
reset_password.expires: This link will expire in 1 hour.
reset_password.ignore: If you didn't request this, please ignore this email.

order_confirmation.subject: Order confirmation #{orderId} - {appName}
order_confirmation.title: Thank you for your purchase!
order_confirmation.body: Your order has been confirmed successfully.
order_confirmation.shipping_notice: We will send you an email when your order is shipped.

refund.subject: Refund process initiated - {appName}
refund.body: The refund process has been initiated for your order #{orderId}.
refund.timeline: The refund will be processed within the next 5-10 business days.

refund_rejected.subject: Refund request rejected - {appName}
refund_rejected.body: Your refund request for order #{orderId} has been rejected.
refund_rejected.contact: If you have any questions, please contact our support team.

account_status.banned_body: Your account has been suspended. If you believe this is an error, please contact support.
account_status.active_body: Your account has been reactivated. You can now log in again.
